eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: North Carolina; Brunswick; New Hanover; Wayne, NC; at 07:35 PM ON APR 16, 2026 Effective until 01:35 AM APR 17, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: MOREHEAD POLICE DEPARTMENT IS SEARCHING FOR OLIVIA KIMBRO. OLIVIA KIMBRO IS A 13 YEAR OLD WHITE FEMALE, APPROXIMATELY 5 FEET TALL AND 125 POUNDS. SHE HAS GREEN EYES AND LONG BLONDE HAIR. SHE WAS LAST SEEN WEARING A BLACK ZIP UP HOODIE AND BROWN PANTS. THE ABDUCTOR IS AN UNKNOW BLACK MALE, APPROXIMATELY FIVE FEET, 6 INCHES, WEIGHING 200 POUNDS. HE WAS LAST SEEN WEARING A BLACK TANK TOP AND BLACK SHORTS. THEY WERE LAST SEEN TRAVELING IN A WHITE SUV. THE MAKE/MODEL IS UNKNOWN. THE LICENSE PLATE IS UNKNOWN. IF YOU HAVE ANY INFORMATION REGARDING THIS ABDUCTION, CONTACT MOREHEAD POLICE DEPARTMENT AT 252-726-1911 OR CALL 911.
